title: Fireworks strictly prohibited in Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Municipal by-law on...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Municipal by-law on the Prevention of Public Nuisance strictly prohibits the discharge of fireworks, firearms, air guns or air pistols on any premises, street, or public place including beaches.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Municipal by-law on the Prevention of Public Nuisance strictly prohibits the discharge of fireworks, firearms, air guns or air pistols on any premises, street, or public place including beaches."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Firecrackers are dangerous to people and animals. Anyone found using or selling fireworks will be prosecuted to the full extent of the law."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please report the setting off or sale of fireworks to Knysna Emergency Services on 044 302 8911 or 060 998 6969.","html":"Please report the setting off or sale of fireworks to Knysna Emergency Services on 044 302 8911 or 060 998 6969."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
